facebook.caption:
4.8 stars. 2,562 reviews. Salinda Resort Phu Quoc Island keeps delivering.

Beachfront location at Cửa Lấp. Three restaurants on-site. A full spa. A cocktail lounge. An outdoor pool that actually gets sun all day.

This is the kind of resort that earns repeat guests, not just one-time bookings.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Pool to beach in 30 seconds flat. Salinda Resort Phu Quoc Island earns its 4.8 for a reason. Three restaurants, a spa, and a cocktail lounge waiting at the end of your beach day.
